Dr. Kumiko Yamaguchi

M.D. from Kagawa Medical School, Japan in 1990.

Ph.D. in Physiology from Kagawa Medical University in 1995.

Joined the Molecular Sciences Institute in March 1999.

Looking at protein kinases from the puffer fish Fugu rubripes and comparing them to human genes.
